changes: IMP: Network scanner now fingerprints 14 camera brands (Hikvision, Dahua, Provision, Reolink, Axis, Annke, Uniview and more) — NVR channels get brand-specific RTSP URL templates with fallbacks
IMP: Camera scan results show brand name, device class (NVR/DVR vs IP Camera), detected credentials and channel count; troubleshooting guide shown when no devices found
IMP: Sensitivity quick-presets — Low / Medium / High / Custom one-click buttons above detection sliders with plain-English labels
FIX: Animal class picker emojis now display correctly; Zebra removed from selectable animal classes
FIX: All Camera model columns now migrated on startup — no more AttributeError on fresh installs
SECURITY: Update packages are AES-256 encrypted — source code not readable from downloaded package; decryption key fetched live from licensing server
SECURITY: License keys validated server-side — revoked or pirated keys rejected; cached 24 h for offline use
FEATURE: Weapon alert plays a 3-burst siren and shows a red banner on the dashboard; per-camera toggle in Camera Settings
FIX: Children and distant people now correctly detected — bounding-box aspect ratio guard prevents small animals from triggering person alerts
FEATURE: Dark / light mode toggle — preference saved to browser storage
FEATURE: Admin and viewer custom usernames shown on navbar and login page
FEATURE: Audit log — last 100 login, logout and settings-change events in Settings
FEATURE: Disk full Telegram alert at 85% usage
FEATURE: Per-camera animal class filter (Dog, Cat, Bird, Horse, Sheep, Cow, Giraffe)
UX: Mobile-friendly layout — camera grids, event cards and stat panels stack on phones
